stageEvidence.evidence: The technician obtained and ran the repository command surface.
The technician reported that OpenCode installed successfully.
Hermes stalled immediately before opening its website and required Ctrl+C or /debug; the automated path did not supply the required newline.
AGY was not installed by the default technician path.
WezTerm was not recognized from the technician's PowerShell command surface.
tmux was not recognized from the technician's PowerShell command surface; the path did not expose the WSL-owned command through an owned Windows shim.

proofCeiling: This fixture records a sanitized operator-observed failure. It proves neither the repaired command nor any later workstation run succeeds.
